feed.title: Maine Revenue Services Tax Alerts
feed.subtitle: Current-issue link plus year-range archive sub-pages of dated PDF alerts; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the index page. NOTE: maine.gov/revenue/rss.xml exists but is an empty/unused Drupal channel.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Revenue Services Tax Alerts
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
